title: Save
description: The only migrating persisted surface (localStorage). Mirrors tools/models.py Save and frontend/src/contracts/save.ts. Tolerant of the read path: a pre-versioned v0 save (no schemaVersion, key == date) AND a v1 save both validate; settings.puckSize and DayState.notes are additive/optional so older saves still load. schemaVersion stays 1 in this row.

evolution.change: Initial Save v1: schemaVersion, days{dayKey -> DayState{date,tier,shapeId,status,placements,attempts,solveMs,hintsUsed,stars}}, hero{bestMs,date}, streak{count,lastDate,skipsLeft}, settings{sound,volume,theme,palette,reducedMotion}. dayKey = 'date|tier|shapeId'; older date-only saves (v0, no schemaVersion) normalize on read.
evolution.why: The one installed-player surface (CLAUDE.md sec 11); the value fields are the source of truth so the incoming key is never trusted and v0 saves migrate transparently.

evolution.change: Additive settings.puckSize (small|medium|large; schemaVersion unchanged). Absent in older saves; defaults to 'medium' on read via the settings spread-merge.
evolution.why: A puck-size player setting scaled from config/ui.json; backward-compatible so no version bump and old saves keep loading.

evolution.change: Additive DayState.notes{manualX,scratchTicks,struckClues} (cross-out grid + clue-strip bookkeeping; schemaVersion unchanged). Omitted when empty.
evolution.why: Row 7 grid bookkeeping; endpoint-keyed scratch state is OPTIONAL so saves without it still validate and load.

evolution.change: Additive settings.display{color,glyphs,labels} (in-puzzle display mode; schemaVersion unchanged). Absent in older saves; deep-merged to the default {true,true,true} on read and clamped so at least one of glyphs/labels stays on.
evolution.why: An in-puzzle display/clarity toggle (color/glyphs/text) reachable from the board + Settings; additive-optional so old saves keep loading with no version bump.

evolution.change: Additive DayState.notes.scratch (free-text scratch pad; schemaVersion unchanged). Omitted when empty; a save without it defaults to an empty string on read.
evolution.why: A per-day free-text scratch pad on the board; additive-optional so older saves keep loading with no version bump (CLAUDE.md #11 read-side default).
